description_long: This bird features a striking combination of earthy and muted tones, with a predominantly reddish-brown head and upper body, accented by a black mask around the eyes and a small crest on top. Its wings are outstretched, displaying a gradient from dark brown to tan, with black and white barring on the tail feathers. The underparts are lighter, with a subtle transition to a creamy beige, and the bird's legs and feet are slender and black. The beak is short, straight, and pointed, ideal for pecking or picking small items. The overall form is compact and streamlined, suggesting agility and quick movement, while the stylized, geometric feather shapes give it a modern, almost cartoon-like appearance.
description: A compact, reddish-brown bird with a black facial mask, small crest, and outstretched wings showing tan and black patterns. Its tail is barred black and white, and it has slender black legs and a pointed beak.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bird's symmetrical outstretched wings, prominent black facial mask, and small crest atop the head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered wing feathers, the pointed beak, and the crest, with the tail's black and white barring visible.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizes the bird's back, the full spread of the wings, and the chevron pattern on the tail feathers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same feather layering, crest, and tail pattern, with the beak and legs visible.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid reddish-brown head and body with black facial mask, tan and black wings, and black-and-white barred tail
